context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the social proof feed (Redis caching, 24-hour order window) and the Q&A notification system (product team alerts, email to question author, upvote deduplication, daily unanswered digest).

checklist.name: Redis setex with 300s TTL
checklist.description: Caches the social proof feed using redis.setex (or equivalent) with a TTL of exactly 300 seconds

checklist.name: 24-hour order window
checklist.description: Fetches orders from the last 24 hours only (using subHours(new Date(), 24) or equivalent) and status 'completed'

checklist.name: No fabricated signals
checklist.description: Social proof data is derived entirely from actual order records — no static arrays, hardcoded names, or invented purchase entries

checklist.name: Product team notified on question
checklist.description: Calls a notification function (e.g. notifyProductTeam) after a new question is submitted

checklist.name: Author email notification on answer
checklist.description: Sends a transactional email to the question author when their question is answered (conditional on authorEmail existing)

checklist.name: Email includes product URL
checklist.description: The answer notification email includes the product URL (e.g. ${STORE_URL}/products/${slug})

checklist.name: Upvote deduplication
checklist.description: The upvote endpoint checks for an existing vote by the same voter (customerId or IP) and returns 409 if already voted

checklist.name: Daily unanswered digest
checklist.description: Implements or documents a daily digest/notification to the product team listing unanswered questions (e.g. a scheduled job or cron)

checklist.name: 7-day threshold mentioned
checklist.description: The unanswered-question follow-up logic references a 7-day threshold (questions unanswered for more than 7 days are highlighted or escalated)

checklist.name: Gallery verified-first ordering
checklist.description: The photo gallery query orders results by verifiedPurchase descending before createdAt descending

checklist.name: Verified purchase badge returned
checklist.description: The gallery API response includes a verifiedPurchase field (boolean or badge indicator) for each photo

checklist.name: CDN URLs for photo responses
checklist.description: Returns CDN-based URLs (using CDN_URL environment variable or equivalent) for thumbnailUrl and mediumUrl, not direct S3 URLs
